q1_confusing: What I found confusing about the system was that it sometimes felt slow. I also understand that the system needed to confirm my previous answers by repeating the question in a slightly different way, but this became a bit frustrating. At times, it felt like I was explaining something to a slower colleague instead of being guided by an efficient system.
q2_change: The system should be more aesthetically pleasing and engaging, so users do not feel bored or mentally drained by having to repeat their answers just to give the system more clarity.
q3_would_automate: I would use the system for my business to identify and engage with followers in the same niche by commenting on relevant posts and accounts, helping to increase interaction and drive traffic and conversions to my website. Currently, this requires a significant amount of manual work. It would be valuable if the system could streamline or automate parts of this process, making it easier to discover relevant engagement opportunities and reduce repetitive tasks.
